title: How To Design a Complete Brand Identity With AI (Best AI Logo Maker)
summary: A sponsored tutorial demonstrating Design.com's AI-powered brand identity design capabilities, including logo generation, brand kit auto-application across 500k+ templates, and animated logos. The creator built three complete brand identities (logo, business cards, social posts) in under 20 minutes each using plain-English chat editing and AI background removal.
writeup: This sponsored tutorial from AI Master walks through Design.com's AI brand identity tools, covering logo generation, a brand kit that auto-applies across more than 500,000 templates, and animated logos. The creator assembles three full brand identities (logo, business cards, and social posts) in under 20 minutes each, using plain-English chat editing and AI background removal. The takeaway: brand assets that traditionally require manual design can be generated and propagated across templates through a single brand kit, with edits driven by conversational prompts.
